name: Quality
description: Describes a non-functional (quality) requirement across dimensions such as performance, reliability, or security.

quality-dimension.name: Quality dimension
quality-dimension.hint: Select or type a quality dimension

criterion.name: Criterion
criterion.hint: Specify the measurable criterion, e.g. responding to 95% of requests within 200 ms

default.name: Quality
default.description: A non-functional requirement specifying a measurable quality criterion.
default.example: The application shall be fast, responding to 95% of requests within 200 ms under normal load.
